# Intercom for Developers

## Integrate with Intercom by building apps on the complete [AI customer service platform](https://www.intercom.com). Create seamless customized experiences in the Intercom Help Desk and Messenger using our APIs and SDKS.

[Start building](/docs)[See App Store](https://www.intercom.com/app-store)

## Install Intercom

On Web, iOS, Android, and more

Make sure the Messenger is available everywhere your customers are. Customize the UI, configure user interactions, or set up [push notifications](https://developers.intercom.com/installing-intercom/ios/push-notifications/).

[Install now](https://developers.intercom.com/installing-intercom/)

## Build and list an app

Offer an integration to Intercom's 25K+ customers

Build an app that helps solve business problems, from AI to reporting. Get started by setting up a free [development workspace](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/getting-started/) to test and publish your app.

[Sign up for free](https://app.intercom.com/admins/sign_up/developer)

## Create a custom integration

For Inbox, Messenger, and accessing data

Build a solution just for your team on your main Intercom workspace. See what's possible with a [Messenger app](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/getting-started/build-an-app-for-your-messenger/) tutorial or [Tickets](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/guides/tickets/create-a-ticket/) tutorial.

[See how it works](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/getting-started/build-an-app-for-your-messenger/)

## Join the brands who build  
on Intercom

![](https://go.intercom.com/rs/258-CLW-344/images/logo-pond@2x.png)

[Go to app store](https://www.intercom.com/app-store)

Engineer @ Coda

![Aircall Logo](https://go.intercom.com/rs/258-CLW-344/images/logo-aircall@2x.png)![Aircall Screenshot](https://go.intercom.com/rs/258-CLW-344/images/asset-aircall@2x.png)

Guides for developers

🎟️ Tickets + GitHub Issues

[Build an integration](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/guides/tickets/build-a-ticketing-app/) using webhooks and the Tickets API to create a GitHub issue when a ticket is created in Intercom.

📈 Reporting

[Create your own reports](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/learn-more/rest-apis/build-your-own-reports/) from conversation and teammates data using the Intercom API.

✉️ Inbox apps for admins

In Intercom, admins are called teammates. [Build an Inbox app](https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/getting-started/build-an-app-for-your-inbox/) for a teammate to log data about a contact.

## Need help?

Get fast, helpful support via chat or in the Intercom Community.

[Join community](https://community.intercom.com/)
